headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -15.7)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 92% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 149 quotes and an overwhelming 115 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 41.0 sits in the lower-middle range of the 148-day period, indicating elevated but not extreme levels.

• Optimism recovered notably from yesterday's deep negative territory, while fears dropped further into negative range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
